code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut count = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut in_token = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut num = 0
  mut has_digits = false
  while i <= n
    mut is_ws = true
    mut b = 0
    if i < n
      match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(v)
        b = v
      when None
        b = 32
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
        is_ws = true
      else
        is_ws = false
      end
    else
      is_ws = true
    end
    if is_ws
      if in_token and has_digits
        let value = num * sign
        if value > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
      end
      in_token = false
      sign = 1
      num = 0
      has_digits = false
    else
      if b == 45 and not in_token
        sign = -1
        in_token = true
      else if b == 43 and not in_token
        sign = 1
        in_token = true
      else
        num = num * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digits = true
        in_token = true
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
